volatility: ConstructionPhaseWorkflow volatility: the sequence by which a project is driven through Phase 3 of The Method — the scheduler-driven activity pump, variance/takeover supervision, operator pause/override, and replan-variance sweep.

inbound.name: schedulerClient
inbound.how: sync in-process (StartWorkflow via Temporal Schedule firing)

outbound.name: handOffEngine
outbound.how: direct by value in-workflow (NOT an Activity); pure/deterministic

outbound.name: interventionEngine
outbound.how: direct by value in-workflow (NOT an Activity); pure/deterministic

outbound.name: reviewEngine
outbound.how: direct by value in-workflow (NOT an Activity); hand-run component for v1

outbound.name: projectStateAccess
outbound.how: Activity-wrapped; writes carry expectedVersion + idempotencyKey; Conflict handled by workflow-level re-read→re-apply

outbound.name: workerAccess
outbound.how: Activity-wrapped; Dispatch is transitional Manager edge (future constructionEngine will own it); Cancel on operator-pause path

outbound.name: constructionPipelineAccess
outbound.how: Activity-wrapped; submit→poll observe→cancel on pause path

outbound.name: durableExecutionAccess
outbound.how: registerSchedule is contract op (Activity-wrapped); startTimer/awaitSignal/executeChild are category-A in-workflow primitives (NOT ops)

ops.note: Reads next eligible activity; if none returns {Dispatched:false}. If eligible, starts per-activity child workflow {projectId}:{activityId} (idempotent) running the UC3 spine: cast worker class → dispatch → pipeline → stage output → review fan-out → record → variance intervention → record exit.

fields.name: Dispatched
fields.note: true iff an eligible activity was found and its child workflow started

fields.name: ActivityID
fields.note: the dispatched activity; nil when Dispatched == false

ops.note: Reads in-flight construction state, identifies activities whose variance exceeds policy threshold, surfaces them in the operator dashboard. Does NOT auto-replan. Returns {FlaggedVariances:[...]}.

fields.name: ProjectId
fields.note: optional; omit to sweep all in-flight projects

ops.note: SignalWorkflow (signal operatorPauseRequested) to in-flight construction executions. On resume: interventionEngine.applyPausePolicy → Manager EXECUTES PausePlan (cancel pipelines + recordOperatorPaused). Returns once signal is durably enqueued.

fields.name: Reason
fields.note: operator rationale; safe to log; rides on signal payload (PauseRequestContext.Reason)

ops.signature: overrideActivity(projectId: ProjectID, activityId: ActivityID, override: ActivityOverride) → void
ops.note: SignalWorkflow (signal operatorOverride) to per-activity child workflow {projectId}:{activityId}. override ∈ {Takeover, Retry, Skip, Reassign}. Executes through same decide→execute machinery as automatic variance path. Returns once signal durably enqueued.

QueryWorkflow (query sessionState). Returns point-in-time technical construction progress (stage, pipeline phase, review set, flagged variance). No mutation. Answers SPA 'where is this construction' question; business-state rollup is head-state read off projectStateAccess (CQRS split).

fields.name: ActivityId
fields.note: optional; scopes the query to a per-activity child workflow when present

fields.name: Stage
fields.note: StageDispatching | StagePipelineRunning | StageReviewing | StageAwaitingTakeover | StagePaused | StageExited

fields.name: PipelinePhase
fields.note: nil when no pipeline in flight

dataContracts: ActivityID  // identifies one Phase-3 construction activity in the committed network
FlaggedVariance struct { ProjectID ProjectID; ActivityID ActivityID; Summary string }
ActivityOverride struct { Kind OverrideKind; Notes string }
ConstructionSessionView struct { ProjectID; ActivityID*; Stage ConstructionStage; PipelinePhase*; ReviewSet*; Variance* }
ConstructionStage: StageDispatching | StagePipelineRunning | StageReviewing | StageAwaitingTakeover | StagePaused | StageExited
errorModel: ConstructionError is framework-go/manager.Error. Kinds: ContractMisuse (empty projectId/activityId; unknown OverrideKind) / FailedPrecondition (executeNextActivity/pauseProject before Phase 2 sealed) / NotFound (addressed workflow does not exist) / Unauthorized (caller failed authZ) / Infrastructure (durable-execution unavailable). A detected construction variance is NOT a façade error — handled inside the workflow via interventionEngine.
idempotency: Workflow-level: idempotent on workflow id (per-activity child idempotent on {projectId}:{activityId}). Activity-level: each projectStateAccess write Activity carries idempotencyKey = '${workflowId}:${activityId}' and expectedVersion; Conflict is terminal at Activity level, handled by workflow-level re-read→re-apply loop.

revisions.summary: First draft: 5 ops (2 Workflow + 2 Signal + 1 Query). Mirrors peer Managers (D-MSD/D-MPD) on op-stereotype, decide→execute discipline, optimistic-concurrency, CQRS split. Flags transitional workerAccess.Dispatch Manager edge (future constructionEngine — OQ-1) and reviewEngine dependency-list gap (OQ-4).

APPROVED-AND-FROZEN. App C §6 9/9 PASS independently reproduced. All OQs ruled: OQ-1 ratified (constructionEngine is Phase-1 amendment, 5 ops stable); OQ-4 MATERIAL ruling — reviewEngine is hand-run by design for v1, no freeze block; OQ-3 confirmed (Reassign uses existing handOffEngine edge). Follow-ups FU-MCN-1 through FU-MCN-4 + FU-MCN-3-extended routed.
